## Summary

Describe the engineering outcome and the user or operator impact.

## Context

- Related issue:
- Why this change is needed:

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] CI or automation

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make precommit`
- [ ] Validation not run, explained below

Validation notes:

## Data And Operational Impact

- [ ] No schema or artifact changes
- [ ] Schema, artifact, or contract behavior changed and downstream impact was reviewed
- [ ] Dashboard behavior changed
- [ ] CLI behavior changed

Impact notes:

## Documentation

- [ ] No docs update required
- [ ] `README.md` updated
- [ ] `docs/` updated
- [ ] Follow-up docs needed

## Risks

Describe rollout, compatibility, data quality, or operational risks. State explicitly if there are no known material risks.
